session.tool_result: 40:def format_pr_cell(pr: PullRequestInfo, *, use_graphite: bool, graphite_url: str | None) -> str: 41- """Format PR cell with clickable link and emoji: #123 👀 or #123 👀🔗 42- 43- The 🔗 emoji is appended for PRs that will auto-close the linked issue when merged. 44- 45- Args: 46- pr: PR information 47- use_graphite: If True, use Graphite URL; if False, use GitHub URL 48- graphite_url: Graphite URL for the PR (None if unavailable) 49- 50- Returns: 51- Formatted string for table cell with OSC 8 hyperlink 52- """ 53- emoji = get_pr_status_emoji(pr) 54- pr_text = f"#{pr.number}" 55- 56- # Append 🔗 for PRs that will close the issue when merged 57- if pr.will_close_target: 58- emoji += "🔗" 59- 60- # Determine which URL to use

260→ if str(row.plan_id) == selected_key: 261→ self.move_cursor(row=idx) 262→ return 263→ 264→ # Plan disappeared - stay at same row index, clamped to valid range 265→ if saved_cursor_row is not None and saved_cursor_row >= 0: 266→ target_row = min(saved_cursor_row, len(rows) - 1) 267→ self.move_cursor(row=target_row) 268→ 269→ def _row_to_values(self, row: PlanRowData) -> tuple[str | Text, ...]: 270→ """Convert PlanRowData to table cell values. 271→ 272→ Args: 273→ row: Plan row data 274→ 275→ Returns: 276→ Tuple of cell values matching column order 277→ """ 278→ # Format issue number - colorize if clickable 279→ plan_cell: str | Text = f"#{row.plan_id}" 280→ if row.plan_url: 281→ plan_cell = f"[link={row.plan_url}]#{row.plan_id}[/link]" 282→ 283→ # Objectives view: plan, slug, progress, state, deps-state, deps, next, updated, author 284→ if self._view_mode == ViewMode.OBJECTIVES: 285→ # Build linkified deps cell (show up to 3, truncate with ... if more) 286→ if row.objective_deps_plans: 287→ limit = 3 if len(row.objective_deps_plans) <= 3 else 2 288→ show = row.objective_deps_plans[:limit] 289→ parts = [f"[link={url}]{display}[/link]" for display, url in show]

Phase 7: Integrate into ErkDashApp. This is the most complex part. I need to: 1. Add imports for RunDataTable and RunRowData 2. Add binding for key "4" to switch to runs view 3. Add `_run_table` and `_run_rows` state 4. Modify `compose()` to include RunDataTable (hidden by default) 5. Modify `on_mount()` to grab RunDataTable reference 6. Modify `_switch_view()` to toggle between plan and run tables 7. Modify `_load_data()` to dispatch to `fetch_runs` for runs view 8. Add `action_switch_view_runs` 9. Add click handlers for RunDataTable messages
